news.title:

Operations at Jubilant Foodworks have returned to normal levels.

news.title:
Retail sector saw 23% YoY revenue growth in Q4 FY26, driven by jewellery demand.
HSBC analysts cite strong SSSG in jewellery; sector resilient to rising input costs.
news.summary:
Retail sector saw 23% YoY revenue growth in Q4 FY26, driven by jewellery demand.

news.title: Elara Capital notes Jubilant FoodWorks has higher LPG exposure vs QSRs.
news.summary: Elara Capital notes Jubilant FoodWorks has higher LPG exposure vs QSRs.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks saw an NSE block trade of 703,038 shares worth Rs. 29.3 crores.
The trade was executed at a price of Rs. 417.00 per share.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks saw an NSE block trade of 703,038 shares worth Rs. 29.3 crores.

news.title:
CLSA upgraded Tata Consumer, Nestle, Jubilant Foodworks, and Swiggy citing attractive valuations.
Price targets raised: Tata Consumer ₹1,193 (+14%), Jubilant ₹520 (+13%), Swiggy ₹357 (+32%).
news.summary:
CLSA upgraded Tata Consumer, Nestle, Jubilant Foodworks, and Swiggy citing attractive valuations.
Price targets raised: Tata Consumer ₹1,193 (+14%), Jubilant ₹520 (+13%), Swiggy ₹357 (+32%).

news.title:
QSR stocks fell 1-8% on BSE amid growth concerns; Jubilant FoodWorks hit 52-week low.
LPG shortages and operational challenges pressure margins; sector adopts measures to mitigate impact.
news.summary:
QSR stocks fell 1-8% on BSE amid growth concerns; Jubilant FoodWorks hit 52-week low.
LPG shortages and operational challenges pressure margins; sector adopts measures to mitigate impact.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks and Devyani International face steep declines but show signs of rebound; Jubilant may rise 33.4%.
Analysts see potential in Jubilant above ₹485 and Devyani above ₹99, despite inflation and competition challenges.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks and Devyani International face steep declines but show signs of rebound; Jubilant may rise 33.4%.
Analysts see potential in Jubilant above ₹485 and Devyani above ₹99, despite inflation and competition challenges.

news.title:
Jubilant Foodworks reported weaker than expected like-for-like growth, disappointing investors.
Trent is preferred over Avenue Supermarts due to current valuations, per Elara Capital.
news.summary:
Jubilant Foodworks reported weaker than expected like-for-like growth, disappointing investors.
Trent is preferred over Avenue Supermarts due to current valuations, per Elara Capital.

news.title: Jubilant Foodworks shares dropped over 6% due to weak Q4 results.
news.summary: Jubilant Foodworks shares dropped over 6% due to weak Q4 results.

news.title:
Macquarie maintains Underperform on Jubilant FoodWorks; TP ₹460 citing weak Domino's India LFL growth at 0.2%.
Healthy store additions and strong international performance, especially Turkey, partially offset weak growth.
news.summary:
Macquarie maintains Underperform on Jubilant FoodWorks; TP ₹460 citing weak Domino's India LFL growth at 0.2%.
Healthy store additions and strong international performance, especially Turkey, partially offset weak growth.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks faced a challenging Q4 with sluggish demand and rising costs.
Indian market Like-for-Like sales growth remained muted, impacting overall growth.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks faced a challenging Q4 with sluggish demand and rising costs.
Indian market Like-for-Like sales growth remained muted, impacting overall growth.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY to Rs. 25,058 mn.
Domino's India stores reached 2,455; Turkey stores at 787 with 9% LFL growth.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY to Rs. 25,058 mn.
Domino's India stores reached 2,455; Turkey stores at 787 with 9% LFL growth.

news.title:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.
news.summary:
Axis Securities warns of margin pressure on HUL, Dabur, Asian Paints due to rising crude and input costs.
FMCG, paints, QSR, and retail sectors face cost shocks; Jubilant FoodWorks, Trent, and V-Mart most vulnerable.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks renews India franchise for 15 years with 10-year extension option.
Exclusive rights for Domino's in Sri Lanka and Bangladesh also renewed.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks renews India franchise for 15 years with 10-year extension option.
Exclusive rights for Domino's in Sri Lanka and Bangladesh also renewed.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks exits Dunkin’ Doughnuts due to weak financials; segment contributed 0.61% to revenue with Rs 191 Cr loss.
Focus shifts to Domino's, a high-return core business; company sees no material impact on operations from this exit.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks exits Dunkin’ Doughnuts due to weak financials; segment contributed 0.61% to revenue with Rs 191 Cr loss.
Focus shifts to Domino's, a high-return core business; company sees no material impact on operations from this exit.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Jubilant FoodWorks.
Target price for Jubilant FoodWorks set at Rs 693 by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Jubilant FoodWorks.
Target price for Jubilant FoodWorks set at Rs 693 by Morgan Stanley.

news.title: Jubilant FoodWorks plans to exit the Dunkin India business post-2026.
news.summary: Jubilant FoodWorks plans to exit the Dunkin India business post-2026.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' board approved non-renewal of Dunkin' brand franchise agreement post-December 2026.
The decision will not materially impact the company's financial or operational performance.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks' board approved non-renewal of Dunkin' brand franchise agreement post-December 2026.
The decision will not materially impact the company's financial or operational performance.

news.title:
Jubilant Food shares fell over 3% in early trade due to LPG shortage.
Operational constraints at some stores impacted trading performance.
news.summary:
